name: Pangolin Newt Addon
description: Installs Pangolin Newt on the Proxmox host or into an existing LXC. Uses the official static binary and systemd/OpenRC so Pangolin Automatic Site Updates work. Prefer the dedicated Newt LXC for isolation.

notes.text: Run on the Proxmox host (not inside a container). Choose Proxmox host or an existing LXC, then enter Pangolin endpoint, Newt ID, and secret.
Host install: Newt can reach everything the host can. Treat it as an extension of the internet. Prefer the dedicated Pangolin Newt LXC when possible.
Primary updates: enable Automatic Site Updates in Pangolin (org or per-site). Requires Newt ≥ 1.13.0 binary install.
Manual fallback — host: `update-newt`. Existing LXC: `pct exec <CTID> -- update-newt` (does not overwrite an app's `/usr/bin/update`).
LXC targets must be Debian, Ubuntu, or Alpine. No TUN device passthrough is required (userspace WireGuard).
This is the site tunnel agent (expose resources to Pangolin). To join a host or LXC into the Pangolin network as a machine client, use the Pangolin CLI Addon instead.
